---
title: Projects
description: "Tools, simulations, and applied work."
---

Software and simulations I build alongside the research papers.

## MutandisLab

[![Instructor Control dashboard during a real class session, 14 firms in Round 6.](/blog/2026/05/mutandislab/img/instructor_control.png)](https://mutandislab.com)

[Live app](https://mutandislab.com) | [Walk-through post](/blog/2026/05/mutandislab/)

MutandisLab is a platform for classroom simulations across domains. The name comes from the Latin *mutatis mutandis*, "change what must". The first simulation is a business strategy game where student teams run competing firms over six rounds (production, pricing, financing, investment) and are ranked by Economic Value Added. The market clears each round on a shared demand curve. First classroom pilot ran in Spring 2026 with 14 teams. More simulations will follow.
